title: apium pumilum
intro: Apium pumilum, also known as Dwarf Celery or Wild Celery, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Apium pumilum can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
